title: Configure Sprout and Conductor workspace durability
description: Add repository-level Conductor setup so new worktrees validate/install Sprout and use the project package manager without npm. Install/update Sprout prime instructions and hooks so task state and traceability are tracked consistently across Conductor workspaces.

affected_files.reason: shared Conductor setup/run configuration for every workspace
persistent Sprout and repository agent instructions
persistent Sprout and repository agent instructions

verify_command: sprout doctor && sprout hooks status --provider all

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: Conductor worktrees cannot check out local main because the root repository owns that worktree branch, so Sprout auto_checkout is disabled and work remains on the Conductor workspace branch while task state tracks the epic review unit.

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: Treat .codegraph/ as generated local index state for this workspace; do not commit or revert it as part of MarkUS work. Add it to Sprout drift ignore so verification focuses on tracked project changes.

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: In Conductor worktrees, complete epic tasks with sprout update --status done plus a normal workspace-branch commit because sprout done --yes tries to check out the epic/base branch and conflicts with the root worktree's local main checkout.

summary: Initialized Sprout project state, added the MarkUS epic/task plan, disabled Sprout auto-checkout for Conductor worktrees, ignored generated .codegraph state, installed Sprout hooks, and refreshed AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md prime blocks.
